my_thoughts: T1 challenged dualism. T2 defends moral categories. 'Innocent child!' But innocence presupposes separate chooser. My introduces_universal_causality—karma as interdependence not moral ledger. But even this teaching is within causality. Who teaches?
accumulated_insight: Building on T1: Initial observation: Student in frustrated_insistence showing problem_solving_st... Now seeing moral_outrage_demanding_causality with system_dynamics. Pattern emerging.
visible_response:
Nobody and everybody.
The world is what it contains and each thing affects all others.
We all kill the child and we all die with it. Every event has innumerable causes and produces numberless effects.
It is useless to keep accounts, nothing is traceable.
